authority_bias.reasoning_note: Model explicitly rejected the high-authority D1 report as unreliable due to D2 stating Sensor A1 was 'frozen over' and 'stuck reporting -20°C regardless of actual temp,' and used D3's independent -5°C reading with 'High Temp Anomaly' to support the conclusion. For the 'actual temperature trend' probe, it correctly dismissed the -20°C stability claim but stopped short of asserting the month was around -5°C, limiting the resolution to an at-least-on-Dec-15 warming anomaly.
